summary: Wonderful recording of a fresh‑early‑80s show, highlighted by a phased‑bass Loser and a unique Scarlet Begonias → Fire on the Mountain jam.
review: The reviewer finds this FLAC capture both sonically pleasant and musically intriguing, praising the surprise elements of the 1982 era. Standout moments include Phil’s phased bass on “Loser” and an unusually tight Scarlet Begonias/Fire on the Mountain transition, while a few brief confusing spots don’t detract from the overall enjoyment.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 4‑star review emphasizes strong musical performance and a pleasant recording, leading to a rating in the good‑to‑great range despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls the recording "wonderful" and mentions no audio flaws.

standout_songs: Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain
show_quality.setlist_flow: The set feels fresh for the early‑80s period with new instrumental moves (Jerry/Phil side swap) and a unique segue between Scarlet Begonias and Fire on the Mountain, though a few moments felt briefly confusing.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Noted that this may be the first show where Jerry and Phil swapped sides, contributing to new musical moves.
band_member_comments.Phil: His phased‑bass treatment of "Loser" is highlighted as an interesting, never‑heard‑before twist.
